title: Lithofin FZ Intensive Cleaner 1L For Porcelain Tiles
description: This product will only be delivered to Mainland UKLithofin FZ Intensive Cleaner is a concentrated, high alkaline cleaner used to remove engrained dirt, grease, oil, and care product residues. It is ideal for thoroughly cleaning ceramic, porcelain, and quarry tiles in heavy traffic areas.Key features and benefits include:Size: 1 litreSize: 1 litreCoverage: Undiluted: Approximately 10-15m2, Diluted: Up to 200m2Coverage: Undiluted: Approximately 10-15m2, Diluted: Up to 200m2Great for extremely dirty natural stone, ceramic tiles, and porcelain tilesGreat for extremely dirty natural stone, ceramic tiles, and porcelain tilesNote: Do not use this product on finely honed or polished limestone or marble.
